text.title: Helm Advanced Patterns Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules plus a skip-clause for `Helm Advanced Patterns`. Each rule pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Library charts MUST set `type: library` in `Chart.yaml`; installing a library chart as a release is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Library charts only export named templates; installing one as a release produces zero rendered resources and silent drift.

rule.statement: Every hook resource MUST declare `helm.sh/hook-weight`; relying on implicit ordering is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Without explicit weight, hook order depends on file-system glob; flaky upgrades follow.

rule.statement: Pod templates referencing ConfigMap/Secret MUST set `checksum/config: {{ include ... | sha256sum }}` annotation; otherwise content changes do not roll pods.
rule.rationale: Without checksum annotation, ConfigMap edits do not trigger Pod restart; stale config persists.

rule.statement: Required values MUST be checked with `required` template function or `values.schema.json`; silent default fallback is forbidden for safety-critical knobs.
rule.rationale: Missing required values default silently to empty string and produce broken manifests.

rule.statement: PersistentVolumeClaim + StatefulSet PVCs MUST carry `helm.sh/resource-policy: keep` annotation.
rule.rationale: Without keep, `helm uninstall` deletes PVCs and underlying data; recovery often impossible.

rule.statement: If `Applies If` preconditions fail OR any `Skip If` trigger fires, do not run this methodology.
